title: GCA Review Queue Contract
scope: Public manual-review contract for live GCA account intake, read-only wallet verification, 100 GCA AI Quant Access credits, GCA Member review, support review, and platform profile follow-up. Eligibility submission and ledger-record creation are live; this file does not create a public ledger browser, automatic token-transfer claim, custody request, or public reserve-wallet instruction.

currentState.publicClaimBoundary: Eligibility submission and ledger-record creation are live. Any future 10,000 GCA member-benefit transfer remains manual reserve-wallet processing after support approval and holding-period verification.

reviewLanes.purpose: Review controlled account intent submitted through the live HTTPS member access path.
Check Base Mainnet chain ID 8453, the official GCA contract, and ERC-20 balanceOf with read-only eth_call.
Review 10,000 GCA eligibility for a one-time 100 GCA AI Quant Access credits record after ledger activation.
Review 1,000,000 GCA plus 30 consecutive days of holding evidence for GCA Member status and one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit review after member ledger activation.
Track support notes without overriding wallet verification, release gates, or platform safety boundaries.
Track BaseScan, GeckoTerminal, wallet-warning, and reviewer follow-up separately from user eligibility.

allowedEvidence: read-only GCA balance from eth_call balanceOf
public purchase or transfer transaction hash used for 30-day holding-period review
member holding start date from gca_member_preregistration_v2 packet

eligibilityThresholds.gcaMemberBenefitSource: project or owner-held reserve transfer only; no new minting
eligibilityThresholds.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
eligibilityThresholds.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus, one member status review, and one member benefit review per registered user

memberBenefitReviewEvidence.holdingStartDateSource: user-entered date in the member pre-registration packet

safeClaims: GCA has published a public review queue contract.
The review queue contract defines manual-review lanes for the live account and ledger intake path.
Wallet review must use read-only eth_call and ERC-20 balanceOf.
GCA Member review requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before the one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit can be approved.
Manual support cannot override on-chain wallet-balance verification.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
doNotClaim: the review queue is a public ledger browser or private-data dropbox
100 GCA AI Quant Access credits are cash, income, reimbursement, trading permission, or transferable value
GCA Member status bypasses wallet verification, holding-period evidence, or support review
the 10,000 GCA member benefit is automatic or self-service transferred before holding-period verification, support approval, and manual reserve-wallet processing
support can override wallet-balance verification, release gates, or public safety boundaries
review status provides trading permission, live order execution, custody, withdrawals, price support, listing approval, or completed third-party audit
